name: Juan Orrego-Salas
abstract: Juan Antonio Orrego-Salas (January 18, 1919 – November 24, 2019) was a Chilean composer, musicologist, music critic, and academic.

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: I had one of my sometime [composition] teachers, Juan Orrego-Salas... I studied composition with Juan Orrego-Salas.
about_quotes.doc_title: David N. Baker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
